# Code of Conduct

Be direct. Be technical. Be respectful.

OLA is security-sensitive infrastructure. Strong disagreement is allowed. Personal attacks,
harassment, private-information disclosure, sustained bad-faith argument, and public handling of
exploitable security details are not.

Do not make the project harder to maintain for ego reasons.

Security reports must stay private until a fix or coordinated disclosure date exists.

Maintainers may edit, close, hide, or remove issues, comments, and PRs that create risk for
contributors, users, maintainers, or the security process. Repeated violations can lead to a ban from
project spaces.
